sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41487" key="e)pifarma/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιφαρμάσσω</orth>, <sense id="n41487.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">apply medicine again to,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐ. τὰ σπλάγχνα ἤδη πεφαρμαγμένα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.16</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
